word: G1667 - ἑλίσσω - helíssō - hel-is'-so - Fold up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑλίσσω

- Transliteration: helisso

- Phonetic: hel-is'-so

- Definition:

1. to roll up, fold together

- Origin: a form of G1507

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A form of G1507; to coil or wrap: - fold up.
